arts.ttl: Barca offer Gavi update after midfielder is taken to hospital with head injury
arts.sum: Laporta says he’s spoken with Gavi and told fans not to worry as the youngster, and Conechny, are both feeling fine. “He’s in the hospital and he and Conechny are fine.

arts.ttl: European football: Barcelona edge Alavés, Juventus rally past Empoli
arts.sum: Lewandowski goal earns Barça 1-0 home victory Kolo Muani double sets up 4-1 comeback win Barcelona closed the gap on La Liga leaders Real Madrid to four points, but were reliant on Robert Lewandowski’s second-half goal to beat struggling Alavés. The hosts dominated possession with Alavés, who sit in 18th place, happy to sit back and defend. Barça almost scored near the half-hour mark when Manu Sánchez’s attempt to clear Raphinha’s cross went to Lewandowski, but the Polish striker put his shot wide. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Las imágenes del durísimo choque de cabezas entre Gavi y Conechny
arts.sum: En los primeros minutos del encuentro se produjo un golpe entre ambos jugadores, con el extremo del Alavés cayendo de una forma muy fea e impactando contra el césped.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick hails one Barcelona star as ‘the best’ after narrow win over Alavés
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has moved to reiterate his appreciation for one member of his squad, on the back of the club’s meeting with Deportivo Alavés. Barca of course…

arts.ttl: Lewandowski scores winner as Barcelona beats Alaves to move closer to the top in Spanish league
arts.sum: Robert Lewandowski scored a second-half winner as Barcelona beat Alaves 1-0 on Sunday to move within four points of rival Real Madrid at the top of the Spanish league. Third-placed Barcelona is three points behind second-placed Atletico Madrid, which ended a two-match winless streak in the league with a 2-0 victory against Mallorca on Saturday.

arts.ttl: One Barcelona star completed 100% of his passes vs Alavés
arts.sum: A head-turning statistic, highlighting the excellence of Barcelona star Frenkie de Jong when in possession, has on Sunday come to the fore online. This comes owing to the Dutchman’s exploits…

arts.ttl: Confirmed: Barcelona miss out on priority January transfer target
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have missed out on the signature of Manchester United star Marcus Rashford. This comes amid confirmation that the attacker is all set to link up with…

arts.ttl: Barcelona 1-0 Alaves: Highlights, man of the match, stats as wonderkid Lamine Yamal shines in vital win for Catalan giants
arts.sum: Robert Lewandowski scores the only goal of the match as Barcelona record a 1-0 victory over Alaves in Sunday afternoon's La Liga contest.

arts.ttl: Barcelona 1-0 Alaves: Player Ratings as Barca Close Gap to Real Madrid in La Liga
arts.sum: Barcelona handled business vs. Alavés and are now just four points behind Real Madrid in La Liga.

arts.ttl: Robert Lewandowski beats Mo Salah and more to season benchmark with Barcelona winner vs Alavés
arts.sum: Barcelona star Robert Lewandowski has on Sunday secured for himself an altogether noteworthy season benchmark. This comes owing to his exploits in Barcelona’s latest outing. Hansi Flick’s troops marked their…
